summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: Community Board, Admin System Messages (Announcements), and Feed Filters. All 31 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified working for all new features.

backend: Topics include all expected categories (homesteading, off-grid, prepping, etc.)
POST /api/community/{id}/comments with parent_id creates threaded reply
frontend: Login page loads correctly
Login with demo user successful
Login with admin user successful
Barter Feed displays with filter buttons (Filters, Nearby, Network, Verified)
Filter buttons toggle correctly
Clear filters button appears when filters active
Community Board navigation in sidebar
Community Board page loads with header 'Share knowledge. Build community. Exit the system.'
Community Board shows empty state 'No posts yet' with 'Create First Post' button
Community Board filters (Nearby, Network, Verified) visible
Create Community Post modal opens
Create Community Post modal has Topic dropdown with 15 topics
Create Community Post modal has Title, Content, Images fields
Community post created successfully with Homesteading topic badge
Community post shows like button and comment count
Like button toggles correctly
Comments section opens with 'Add a comment...' input
Admin Dashboard loads with Overview tab
Admin Dashboard shows Announcements tab
Announcements tab shows empty state 'No announcements yet'
Create Announcement modal opens with Message, Type, Priority, Active fields
Announcement created with WARNING badge
Announcement shows toggle, edit, delete buttons
System Banner appears on Barter Feed with warning message
System Banner appears on Community Board with warning message
System Banner has dismiss (X) button

critical_code_review_comments: Community Board API properly validates title and content requirements
System messages endpoint correctly allows public access for active messages
Admin role enforcement working correctly for system message management
Threaded comments implementation working with parent_id
Feed filters properly pass query parameters to backend
Topic filter dropdown populated with 15 categories
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed community posts and system messages during testing. Posts cleaned up via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features fully tested: Community Board (15 topic categories, post creation, likes, threaded comments), Admin Announcements (create/edit/toggle/delete system messages), Feed Filters (Nearby/Network/Verified/Category). System Banner displays on both Barter Feed and Community Board. All backend APIs working (31/31 tests pass). Frontend UI verified across all new features.

COMMUNITY_BOARD.details: Navigation, empty state, post creation with topic selection, likes, comments, threaded replies all working

COMMUNITY_TOPICS.details: 15 topics returned: homesteading, off-grid, prepping, diy, gardening, livestock, food, energy, water, security, health, finance, community, news, general

ADMIN_ANNOUNCEMENTS.details: Announcements tab in admin dashboard, create/edit/toggle/delete system messages, type selection (info/warning/success/urgent), priority setting

SYSTEM_BANNER.details: Banner displays on Barter Feed and Community Board, shows warning icon for warning type, dismiss button works

FEED_FILTERS.details: Nearby, Network, Verified filter buttons toggle correctly, Clear filters button appears, Category dropdown works

BARTER_FEED_FILTERS.details: Filters (Nearby, Network, Verified) and Category dropdown (Goods, Services, Skills) working on Barter Feed
